Rejection_Letter_Text: Your policy restricts full coverage to our network hospitals. Since you were treated at a non-network facility without a prior emergency authorization, the claim is denied.

Appeal_Suggestion: If it was a life-threatening emergency, submit an emergency certificate from the attending doctor to get an exception.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The life assured stopped paying premiums in the first year. Since the policy did not acquire any paid-up value, no death benefit is payable.

Appeal_Suggestion: If there was a system error preventing payment, contact the grievance department with proof of attempted payments.

Plain_English_Explanation: You have a personal auto policy, but you were using the car for business or as a taxi, which requires a different policy.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the car was NOT being used for business, provide evidence like a logbook or a statement proving personal use at the time.

Policy_Clause: Section 4.1: Exclusion of Pre-Existing Conditions declared or undeclared prior to policy inception.

Appeal_Suggestion: Submit past medical records proving this condition was diagnosed after the policy start date.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The claim is rejected as the vehicle was being operated by an individual not listed as an authorized driver in your policy schedule.

Policy_Clause: Limitation as to Use: The policy covers use of the vehicle for social, domestic and pleasure purposes only. Hire or reward usage is excluded.

Appeal_Suggestion: If the car was NOT being used for business, provide evidence like a logbook or a statement proving personal use at the time.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Your policy restricts full coverage to our network hospitals. Since you were treated at a non-network facility without a prior emergency authorization, the claim is denied.
Policy_Clause: Section 3.1: Cashless facilities and full reimbursements are only applicable at network hospitals. Non-network hospital claims are capped or excluded.

Appeal_Suggestion: If it was a life-threatening emergency, submit an emergency certificate from the attending doctor to get an exception.

Rejection_Letter_Text: We regret to inform you that your claim has been rejected. The treatment falls under the 24-month waiting period clause, and your policy has only been active for 21 months.

Appeal_Suggestion: If the condition was diagnosed AFTER the policy was purchased, submit medical records showing the exact date of first diagnosis.

Plain_English_Explanation: The life insurance policy was cancelled before the person passed away because the premium payments stopped.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the premium was deducted from the bank account via auto-debit, submit the bank statement showing the successful deduction.

Rejection_Letter_Text: As the unfortunate demise occurred within 12 months of policy issuance and the cause of death is recorded as suicide, the death benefit is not payable.
Policy_Clause: Clause 8: If the Life Assured commits suicide within 12 months from the date of inception of the policy, the nominee is only entitled to 80% of premiums paid, not the sum assured.
Plain_English_Explanation: Life insurance does not pay out the full amount if the policyholder commits suicide within the first year of the policy.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the police conclude it was an accident and not suicide, submit the final police investigation report and autopsy findings.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Our investigation revealed that your private vehicle (Maruti Swift) was being used for commercial ride-sharing purposes at the time of the loss, violating the usage limitation.
Policy_Clause: Limitation as to Use: The policy covers use of the vehicle for social, domestic and pleasure purposes only. Hire or reward usage is excluded.
Plain_English_Explanation: You have a personal auto policy, but you were using the car for business or as a taxi, which requires a different policy.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the car was NOT being used for business, provide evidence like a logbook or a statement proving personal use at the time.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Dear Policyholder, upon reviewing your claim for Asthma treatment, we found that this condition existed prior to your policy start date. As per the policy terms, claims related to pre-existing conditions are excluded.
Policy_Clause: Section 4.1: Exclusion of Pre-Existing Conditions declared or undeclared prior to policy inception.
Plain_English_Explanation: Your claim was denied because our records indicate you had Asthma before buying this insurance policy.
Appeal_Suggestion: Submit past medical records proving this condition was diagnosed after the policy start date.

Rejection_Letter_Text: During claim assessment, it was discovered that the Life Assured had a documented history of severe diabetes which was not disclosed in the proposal form. The claim is repudiated.
Policy_Clause: Section 45: The policy can be called into question within three years if there is suppression of material facts related to the health of the insured.
Plain_English_Explanation: The policyholder hid a major pre-existing illness when buying the policy. Because of this, the payout is denied.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the condition was diagnosed AFTER the policy was purchased, submit medical records showing the exact date of first diagnosis.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The claim for Stem Cell Therapy has been categorized as a cosmetic enhancement. Under the policy terms, purely aesthetic procedures are not indemnified.
Policy_Clause: Section 4.5: Expenses for cosmetic or plastic surgery, unless necessitated by an accident or burns, are excluded.
Plain_English_Explanation: We don't cover surgeries or treatments that are done just to improve appearance.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the surgery was medically necessary (e.g., due to an accident), submit a detailed doctor's certificate explaining why.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The claimant details do not match the nominee information recorded in our policy schedule. We cannot process the payout to an unverified individual.
Policy_Clause: Clause 9.3: Claim benefits are strictly payable to the nominee registered in our records at the time of death.
Plain_English_Explanation: The person claiming the money is not the person listed as the beneficiary on the policy.
Appeal_Suggestion: Provide a succession certificate from a civil court legally establishing your right to receive the policy benefits.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Your policy restricts full coverage to our network hospitals. Since you were treated at a non-network facility without a prior emergency authorization, the claim is denied.
Policy_Clause: Section 3.1: Cashless facilities and full reimbursements are only applicable at network hospitals. Non-network hospital claims are capped or excluded.

Appeal_Suggestion: If it was a life-threatening emergency, submit an emergency certificate from the attending doctor to get an exception.

Plain_English_Explanation: Your specific insurance plan does not include coverage for Bariatric Surgery.
Appeal_Suggestion: Check your policy brochure. If you purchased an add-on that covers this, submit the add-on endorsement document.

Rejection_Letter_Text: During claim assessment, it was discovered that the Life Assured had a documented history of severe diabetes which was not disclosed in the proposal form. The claim is repudiated.
Policy_Clause: Section 45: The policy can be called into question within three years if there is suppression of material facts related to the health of the insured.
Plain_English_Explanation: The policyholder hid a major pre-existing illness when buying the policy. Because of this, the payout is denied.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the condition was diagnosed AFTER the policy was purchased, submit medical records showing the exact date of first diagnosis.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The claim investigation notes that the death occurred while the Life Assured was engaged in an unapproved hazardous sport (paragliding), which is an explicit exclusion.
Policy_Clause: Clause 12: Death arising directly or indirectly from participation in hazardous sports or illegal activities is excluded from coverage.
Plain_English_Explanation: The policy does not cover death caused by participating in extreme, dangerous sports.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the death was unrelated to the hazardous activity, provide the detailed forensic and police report clarifying the exact cause.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Your claim was submitted 76 days after discharge, exceeding the maximum allowable limit of 30 days as per your policy guidelines.
Policy_Clause: Section 6.3: All reimbursement claims must be submitted within 30 days of hospital discharge.
Plain_English_Explanation: You waited too long to submit your claim. Claims must be filed within 30 days of leaving the hospital.
Appeal_Suggestion: If you were physically unable to submit the claim earlier, provide a medical certificate proving your incapacitation during that time.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Our verification with the issuing municipal authority confirmed that the submitted death certificate is not authentic. The claim is outrightly rejected.
Policy_Clause: Clause 11: Submission of forged or manipulated death certificates or medical records will result in absolute repudiation of the claim.

Rejection_Letter_Text: You installed an unauthorized CNG kit/alloy wheels without informing the insurer, altering the vehicle's risk profile. The claim is thus rejected.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The life assured stopped paying premiums in the first year. Since the policy did not acquire any paid-up value, no death benefit is payable.

Plain_English_Explanation: The medical procedure (Rhinoplasty) you received is considered experimental and isn't covered by standard insurance.
Appeal_Suggestion: Provide a letter from your doctor and peer-reviewed medical journals proving the treatment is now standard protocol, not experimental.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The claim for Bariatric Surgery has been categorized as a cosmetic enhancement. Under the policy terms, purely aesthetic procedures are not indemnified.
Policy_Clause: Section 4.5: Expenses for cosmetic or plastic surgery, unless necessitated by an accident or burns, are excluded.
Plain_English_Explanation: We don't cover surgeries or treatments that are done just to improve appearance.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the surgery was medically necessary (e.g., due to an accident), submit a detailed doctor's certificate explaining why.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The damages claimed for the Toyota Corolla's engine are due to mechanical breakdown and wear-and-tear, not an accidental external means. This is explicitly excluded.
Policy_Clause: Section I - Loss of or Damage to the Vehicle: Consequential loss, depreciation, wear and tear, and mechanical or electrical breakdown are not covered.
Plain_English_Explanation: Insurance covers accidents, not regular wear and tear or mechanical breakdowns (like a failing engine).
Appeal_Suggestion: If an accident directly caused the mechanical failure, get a technical report from a certified mechanic explaining the connection.

Rejection_Letter_Text: You reported the incident 22 days after it occurred. This unreasonable delay prejudiced our ability to assess the damage, leading to claim rejection.
Policy_Clause: Condition 1: Notice shall be given in writing to the Company immediately upon the occurrence of any accidental loss or damage.
Plain_English_Explanation: You took too long to tell us about the accident, which means we couldn't properly investigate the damage.
Appeal_Suggestion: If you were hospitalized or incapacitated after the accident, provide medical records to justify the delay in reporting.

Rejection_Letter_Text: During claim assessment, it was discovered that the Life Assured had a documented history of severe diabetes which was not disclosed in the proposal form. The claim is repudiated.
Policy_Clause: Section 45: The policy can be called into question within three years if there is suppression of material facts related to the health of the insured.
Plain_English_Explanation: The policyholder hid a major pre-existing illness when buying the policy. Because of this, the payout is denied.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the condition was diagnosed AFTER the policy was purchased, submit medical records showing the exact date of first diagnosis.

Rejection_Letter_Text: We regret to inform you that your claim has been rejected. The treatment falls under the 24-month waiting period clause, and your policy has only been active for 18 months.
Policy_Clause: Section 3.2: A mandatory waiting period of 24 months applies to specific ailments including joint replacement and cardiovascular procedures.
Plain_English_Explanation: You haven't had the policy long enough to cover this specific treatment. There is a waiting period you must pass first.
Appeal_Suggestion: Review your policy start date. If you believe the waiting period has passed, provide your original policy documents.

Policy_Clause: Clause 3.1: If the due premium is not paid within the grace period, the policy shall lapse and all benefits will cease.
Plain_English_Explanation: The life insurance policy was cancelled before the person passed away because the premium payments stopped.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the premium was deducted from the bank account via auto-debit, submit the bank statement showing the successful deduction.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The life assured stopped paying premiums in the first year. Since the policy did not acquire any paid-up value, no death benefit is payable.
Policy_Clause: Clause 3.4: In case of premium default, the policy acquires a paid-up value only if premiums have been paid for at least two consecutive years.
Plain_English_Explanation: The policy was active for less than two years before payments stopped, meaning it holds no payout value.
Appeal_Suggestion: If there was a system error preventing payment, contact the grievance department with proof of attempted payments.

Rejection_Letter_Text: We regret to inform you that your claim has been rejected. The treatment falls under the 24-month waiting period clause, and your policy has only been active for 12 months.
Policy_Clause: Section 3.2: A mandatory waiting period of 24 months applies to specific ailments including joint replacement and cardiovascular procedures.
Plain_English_Explanation: You haven't had the policy long enough to cover this specific treatment. There is a waiting period you must pass first.
Appeal_Suggestion: Review your policy start date. If you believe the waiting period has passed, provide your original policy documents.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Since your claim involves theft/third-party malicious damage, a First Information Report (FIR) from the police is mandatory. As it was not provided, the claim is closed.
Policy_Clause: Condition 2: In case of theft or criminal act causing damage, the insured shall give immediate notice to the Police and cooperate with the Company.
Plain_English_Explanation: For claims involving theft or vandalism, we need an official police report. You didn't submit one.
Appeal_Suggestion: File a report with the police immediately and submit the stamped FIR copy to reopen the claim.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Following an investigation by our field team, discrepancies were found in the hospital admission records. Consequently, the claim is repudiated on grounds of misrepresentation.
Policy_Clause: Section 8.3: Any fraudulent act, misrepresentation, or falsified documentation will result in immediate claim rejection and policy cancellation.
Plain_English_Explanation: We found conflicting or fake information in the documents submitted, so the claim was denied.
Appeal_Suggestion: Provide a sworn affidavit and verified documents from the hospital administrator confirming your admission and treatment.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Your policy restricts full coverage to our network hospitals. Since you were treated at a non-network facility without a prior emergency authorization, the claim is denied.
Policy_Clause: Section 3.1: Cashless facilities and full reimbursements are only applicable at network hospitals. Non-network hospital claims are capped or excluded.
Plain_English_Explanation: You went to a hospital that is not on our approved list, and your specific plan doesn't cover out-of-network care.
Appeal_Suggestion: If it was a life-threatening emergency, submit an emergency certificate from the attending doctor to get an exception.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Our investigation revealed that your private vehicle (Honda Civic) was being used for commercial ride-sharing purposes at the time of the loss, violating the usage limitation.
Policy_Clause: Limitation as to Use: The policy covers use of the vehicle for social, domestic and pleasure purposes only. Hire or reward usage is excluded.
Plain_English_Explanation: You have a personal auto policy, but you were using the car for business or as a taxi, which requires a different policy.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the car was NOT being used for business, provide evidence like a logbook or a statement proving personal use at the time.

Rejection_Letter_Text: During claim assessment, it was discovered that the Life Assured had a documented history of severe diabetes which was not disclosed in the proposal form. The claim is repudiated.
Policy_Clause: Section 45: The policy can be called into question within three years if there is suppression of material facts related to the health of the insured.
Plain_English_Explanation: The policyholder hid a major pre-existing illness when buying the policy. Because of this, the payout is denied.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the condition was diagnosed AFTER the policy was purchased, submit medical records showing the exact date of first diagnosis.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Your motor insurance policy had expired on 4 days prior to the accident date. Therefore, no coverage was in force.
Policy_Clause: General Condition: The policy is void if the premium is not paid in full before the inception of the risk.
Plain_English_Explanation: Your auto insurance expired before the accident happened because you didn't pay the renewal.
Appeal_Suggestion: If you paid the premium on time, submit your bank transaction ID and receipt to prove the policy was active.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The damages claimed for the Hyundai Creta's engine are due to mechanical breakdown and wear-and-tear, not an accidental external means. This is explicitly excluded.
Policy_Clause: Section I - Loss of or Damage to the Vehicle: Consequential loss, depreciation, wear and tear, and mechanical or electrical breakdown are not covered.
Plain_English_Explanation: Insurance covers accidents, not regular wear and tear or mechanical breakdowns (like a failing engine).
Appeal_Suggestion: If an accident directly caused the mechanical failure, get a technical report from a certified mechanic explaining the connection.

Rejection_Letter_Text: The claim cannot be processed as the policy was in a lapsed state at the time of the Life Assured's demise due to non-payment of premiums.
Policy_Clause: Clause 3.1: If the due premium is not paid within the grace period, the policy shall lapse and all benefits will cease.
Plain_English_Explanation: The life insurance policy was cancelled before the person passed away because the premium payments stopped.
Appeal_Suggestion: If the premium was deducted from the bank account via auto-debit, submit the bank statement showing the successful deduction.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Your policy restricts full coverage to our network hospitals. Since you were treated at a non-network facility without a prior emergency authorization, the claim is denied.
Policy_Clause: Section 3.1: Cashless facilities and full reimbursements are only applicable at network hospitals. Non-network hospital claims are capped or excluded.
Plain_English_Explanation: You went to a hospital that is not on our approved list, and your specific plan doesn't cover out-of-network care.
Appeal_Suggestion: If it was a life-threatening emergency, submit an emergency certificate from the attending doctor to get an exception.

Rejection_Letter_Text: Your claim is rejected because your policy had lapsed at the time of hospitalization. The renewal premium was not received within the 30-day grace period.
Policy_Clause: Section 1.2: Coverage is contingent upon timely payment of renewal premiums. A grace period of 30 days is provided.
Plain_English_Explanation: Your insurance policy was not active when you were treated because the premium payment was missed.
Appeal_Suggestion: If you made the payment and it wasn't recorded, submit your bank statement or payment receipt.
